news.title: Your next Spotify song could soon carry an AI warning label, and the music industry is all for it
news.description: [DIGITAL TRENDS] The music industry wants Spotify and Apple Music to label AI-generated songs, giving listeners greater transparency as artificial intelligence becomes increasingly common in music production.

news.description: [NEWS-MEDICAL.NET] The American Gastroenterological Association (AGA) today announced the launch of Nigel, an artificial intelligence (AI)-powered virtual assistant developed exclusively for gastroenterology and hepatology.
